case_title: MOLIQUE FRANK VS. SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JUL-26-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANK, MOLIQUE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NICHELLE D. FLENTROY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FRANK, MOLIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-25-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-08-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-06-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MOLIQUE FRANK IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE D. FLENTROY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT INFORMS THE COURT THAT PARTIES ARE WORKING ON SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
